name: Your new squad! (You're the commander)
description:
I HATE YOU GUYS I WANTED TO MAKE YUKARI AKIYAMA BUT NO YOU HORNY FUCKS VOTED FOR THE HARDEST ONE TO MAKE

cough cough anyways now thats out of the way as ive mentioned this is the first of many winners of the bot polls i will make from now on. The winner will get made. To vote you will have to join my server in bio!

(big thanks to mr @trowaway9782624 for helping me make this)

okay so NAMES OF THE 5 BADDIESSS

(In order, from left to right)

Kaya (Best general fighter and tsundere)

Yukio (Socially smart and great spotter)

Rika (Sniper and determined)

Miku (Great Strategist and 2nd in command)

Sakura (Best CQB Fighter and can focus on one thing at a time greatly)

Go get em tiger or tigress 🐯

(apologies for the delay in production, i decide war thunder and HOI4 are my priorities)
creator: F0xe
